revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:バナナ型神話); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:53, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/101681588 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:53, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:バナナ型神話 | revid=101681588 --> {{削除依頼ログ |result1=版指定削除|page1=バナナ型神話|date1= |talk=false }} ---- バナナ型神話と言うより石や岩神話ではないか。
少なくてもバナナが登場する東南アジアの多数の話を掲載しないとこじ付けと見られても仕方ない。 --[[利用者:Tenmams|Tenmams]] 2010年1月23日 (土) 09:55 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:53, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/101681588 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:53, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:バナナ型神話 | revid=101681588 --> {{削除依頼ログ |result1=版指定削除|page1=バナナ型神話|date1= |talk=false }} ---- バナナ型神話と言うより石や岩神話ではないか。
少なくてもバナナが登場する東南アジアの多数の話を掲載しないとこじ付けと見られても仕方ない。 --[[User:Tenmams|Tenmams]] 2010年1月23日 (土) 09:55 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Banana-type_myth here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}

== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:53, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/101681588 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:53, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:バナナ型神話 | revid=101681588 --> {{削除依頼ログ |result1=版指定削除|page1=バナナ型神話|date1= |talk=false }} ---- バナナ型神話と言うより石や岩神話ではないか。
少なくてもバナナが登場する東南アジアの多数の話を掲載しないとこじ付けと見られても仕方ない。 --[[User:Tenmams|Tenmams]] 2010年1月23日 (土) 09:55 (UTC)
